title: Issued Certificate Term and Condition
description: Issued Certificate Term and Condition refers to the governing rules, usage limitations, validity controls, redemption procedures, and lifecycle constraints applied after a Rewards Certificate has been issued and recorded in the Issued Certificate Directory.

IssuedCertificateTermandConditionType.description: An Issued Certificate Term and Condition Type is a classification of the legal, operational, or usage rules that govern an issued certificate.
